name: cloud ADR: a security decision is grounded in the DoD SCCA and NIST zero-trust sources
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cloud-adr.sh" --title "Zero Trust mesh" --slug zero-trust-mesh --seq 7 --pillar security --decision "mTLS per service" --options "VPN, mesh, hybrid" --rationale "least privilege" --out-dir adr --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("adr/0007-zero-trust-mesh.json","utf8"));const s=j.grounding_sources;process.exit(j.grounding==="grounded"&&s.includes("dod-scca")&&s.includes("nist-zero-trust")?0:1)' && echo gov-grounded 1>&2
